title: Remove conmon, get package from CRI-O
body:
conmon should not be built in two different places.
conmon is now a separate package in Fedora so we can just
add requires, for use on Ubuntu we can just require cri-o to
be installed.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: Can we add something in the README/tutorial to help folks building from source get a working copy?
:boom: Invalid `.papr.yml`: file could not be parsed as valid YAML.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably 0985fce) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.

Amazing this finally passes the tests.
@mheon @baude @umohnani8 @TomSweeneyRedHat PTAL
LGTM, though we should add instructions for building from source to the tutorial
Lets do that as a separate PR.
LGTM, and it's green, SHIP IT!
